description: Red handbag with a front strap with fold-over clasp metal, gussets on the front, one short handle woven through metallic loops on the side, one metallic brand badge hanging from one of the loops and one fixed at the back, one external zipped pocket in the front, one main zippered compartment with two slots with an inner zipped pocket in between, a zipped pocket on one side and an organiser sleeve on the other side, one external zipped pocket at the back
